ogTitle: Glengarry vs Glengarry West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glengarry and Glengarry West.
heading: Glengarry vs Glengarry West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glengarry, Victoria and Glengarry West, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glengarry West has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Glengarry (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glengarry or Glengarry West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glengarry has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Glengarry West scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glengarry scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Glengarry West scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glengarry or Glengarry West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glengarry West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
